summary: Iteration 82: Connect Services refactoring verification. All backend API tests pass (9/9). Payment settings now read from oauth_connections. Cart.tsx and FormSchemaBuilder.tsx fixes verified in code review.
critical_code_review_comments: Cart.tsx line 614: field key fallback (field.key || field.name || field.id) correctly implemented
FormSchemaBuilder.tsx line 61: safe sort with nullish coalescing (a.order ?? 0) correctly handles undefined order values
FormSchemaBuilder.tsx line 193-196: options handling supports both array and string formats
Cart.tsx parseOptions function (lines 68-72) handles array and newline-separated string options
context_for_next_testing_agent: Connect Services refactoring complete. Payment settings (stripe_enabled, gocardless_enabled, fee_rate) now read from oauth_connections collection. Cart.tsx dropdown options work with field.id fallback. FormSchemaBuilder handles undefined order values and string/array options. Admin panel Website Content > Forms section displays Quote Request Form, Scope Request Form, Bank Transaction Form. Checkout Page Builder uses checkout_sections from settings.
verified_features: Admin login with tenant-b-test credentials - WORKING
/api/website-settings returns stripe_enabled, gocardless_enabled, stripe_fee_rate, gocardless_fee_rate - WORKING
checkout_sections with fields_schema containing select fields with options - WORKING
/api/oauth/integrations returns stripe and gocardless with settings config - WORKING
Admin Website Settings page loads without errors - WORKING
Forms section shows Quote Request Form, Scope Request Form, Bank Transaction Form - WORKING

code_fixes_verified_in_review.Cart.tsx: Line 614 uses field.key || field.name || field.id for dropdown field keys
code_fixes_verified_in_review.FormSchemaBuilder.tsx: Lines 193-196 handle both array and string options in textarea display

notes: Cart dropdown testing was limited because tenant-b-test products show 'Request a Quote' (pricing is fixed but checkout_sections might not be visible without an add-to-cart flow). The FormSchemaBuilder is visible in Website Content > Forms and no runtime errors were observed during navigation.
